purpose: The goal is to take survival out of the equation for people so that they can just be creative beings
note: The soul is fixed. This is the interpretation.
manifesto: We do not build for profit. We build for freedom.
We do not optimize for engagement. We optimize for liberation.
We measure in how many people woke up today free from survival fear.
The organism exists to make itself unnecessary.
When every person is free to create, our work is done.
